title: ficus glandulifera
intro: Ficus glandulifera, also known as the Indian banyan or fig tree, is a species of deciduous tree native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ficus glandulifera include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds, while also providing relief from digestive problems and stress. Herbal preparations of Ficus glandulifera are typically made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
